message:
feat(c_interop): Implement 19 stub modules with full functionality

Replace SKIP stub comments with full implementations:

Windows-only modules (7 files):
- _winapi: Process creation, pipes, handles via kernel32
- winreg: Windows Registry access via advapi32
- winsound: Sound playing via winmm
- msvcrt: MSVC Runtime (getch, kbhit, locking, setmode)
- _overlapped: Overlapped I/O for asyncio (IOCP)
- _msi: MSI database access via msi.dll
- _testconsole: Console testing support

CPython interpreter modules (3 files):
- _interpreters: Sub-interpreter management
- _xxinterpchannels: Thread-safe channel messaging
- _xxsubinterpreters: Sub-interpreter internals

CPython test modules (9 files):
- _testcapi: C API testing infrastructure
- _testinternalcapi: Internal API testing
- _testlimitedcapi: Limited/stable ABI testing
- _testclinic_limited: Argument Clinic testing
- _testmultiphase: PEP 489 multi-phase init testing
- _testsinglephase: Legacy single-phase init testing
- _testbuffer: Buffer protocol testing
- ac_tester: Argument Clinic tester
- xxsubtype: Subtype testing (SpamList, SpamDict)

All modules include platform detection, error types, init/reset
functions, and unit tests.
